summary: GH-96 docs-only Desktop Task Thread checkpoint spec is sufficient for PR #114. The scope is VISION/README/DESIGN/ADR/design-reference/carrier only and does not claim UI, schema, API, runtime, evidence, or implementation completion.
reviewed_validation_summary: `git diff --check` pass；`jq empty .loom/specs/GH-96/build-evidence.json` pass；`loom suite validate --target . --item GH-96 --json` returned `not_applicable` with no missing inputs；`loom fact-chain --target . --json` pass。
follow_ups: Do not treat this spec approval as Electron/React shell, UI implementation, schema/API/runtime implementation, fixture, evidence policy, or Core/Harbor/Lode contract completion.
